prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: PRF-PFT-HGHANDBOOK-HGHB Product Type: ABIS_BOOK Brand (from catalog): Productive Fitness Existing Title: Productive Fitness The Great Home Gym Handbook Exercise Reference Guide Description: Whether you’re a home gym beginner or a seasoned expert, the Great Home Gym Handbook from Productive Fitness is a must-have workout accessory for any home gym machine owner. This handbook provides instructions on how to set up and safely use a home gym machine and equipment and will help ensure you’re using everything properly for a safe exercise experience.

Inside the handbook, you’ll find instructions for 32 common home gym exercises that can provide a full-body workout. The handbook clearly explains how to set up a personal workout program that will suit your goals. It teaches about safety, stretching, how to maintain your home gym, and how to stay motivated.

The handbook comes with 64 pages printed in color and features muscle anatomy diagrams so you can visualize your progress. The compact-sized handbook easily fits inside just about any backpack, travel bag, or gym bag. Search Terms: personal trainer gym equipment exercise muscle groups workout home planner guidebook instructions Features: - HOME GYM HANDBOOK - Productive Fitness “The Great Home Gym Handbook” provides instructions on how to set up and safely use a home gym machine and home gym equipment; Ensure you’re using everything properly for a safe exercising routine - 32 EXERCISES - Home Gym handbook features instructions for 32 common home gym exercises for a full body workout; Handbook clearly explains how to set up a personal workout program to suit your goals - COMPLETE GUIDE - Handbook teaches about safety, stretching, how to maintain your home gym, and how to stay motivated; Great fitness guidebook for beginners and home gym experts - DIAGRAMS INCLUDED - Handbook comes with 64 pages and features muscle anatomy diagrams so you can visualize your progress; Printed in color - COMPACT SIZE - Handbook measures 8” x 5”; Easily fits inside of most backpacks, travel bags, and gym bags === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Productive Fitness The Great Home Gym Handbook

openai.item_name: Productive Fitness Home Gym Handbook Exercise Reference Guide

tokens.name: Home Gym Handbook Exercise Reference Guide

anthropic.title_differentiation: 32 Exercises, Full Body Workout, Muscle Anatomy Diagrams, Safety Guide, Compact 8X5 Inch

openai.title_differentiation: 32 Exercises, Safety And Stretching, Muscle Anatomy Diagrams, 64 Color Pages, Workout Planning, Compact 8X5 Guide
